row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a curved road path.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red trajectory lines indicate ego path and potential object paths; blue line suggests lane boundary or reference.

semantic.scene_summary: Nighttime driving scene on a two-lane residential road with streetlights illuminating the pavement. Road curves slightly to the right ahead.
semantic.visibility_notes: Low-light conditions reduce visibility of distant objects; some areas are obscured by darkness.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression; no abrupt jumps or flickering in static elements.
logical.object_continuity: Distant vehicle remains visible throughout frames without sudden disappearance or duplication.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and lighting remain consistent across frames; minor compression artifacts present but do not disrupt structure.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily along the curved road.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards visible; low visibility may require cautious driving but no emergency maneuver is indicated.

semantic.scene_summary: AI-generated version of the same nighttime road scene. Streetlights and road layout are preserved but appear slightly distorted or less defined.
semantic.visibility_notes: Objects are more blurred and less coherent than real video; some structures appear warped or merged.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion is simulated but exhibits slight warping and temporal instability in light patterns and road edges.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicle lights persist but vary in shape and intensity unnaturally; occasional ghosting or fading occurs.
logical.structure_continuity: Road boundaries show minor drift and deformation over time; overall structure maintained but with perceptible artifacts.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Simulated ego motion follows similar forward trajectory as real video.
decision.risk_context: Reduced clarity and structural instability may impair accurate perception; no explicit risky interaction shown but scene readability is compromised.

artifacts_or_instabilities: loss of fine detail in objects
